action.reasoning: Observation: Simple MLP baseline failed with CUDA kernel error (no kernel image available) during first forward pass despite 'gpu' env; printed data shapes but crashed before full training/eval. Analysis: Torch CUDA incompatibility with GPU (common in some containers); model+data pipeline otherwise correct (normalization, dataset, checkpointing, predict contract test). Decision: Force CPU device in train.py/predict.py (model small so no perf issue), reduce num_workers=2 to avoid CPU overload, add try/except for device, rerun with same 3 epochs for quick baseline + eval submission to measure time.
